heading: Post petition effect of security interest
label: 928 Post petition effect of security interest
notes: Effective DateSection effective , but not applicable to any case commenced under this title before that date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under .Nov. 3, 1988section 12 of Pub. L. 100–597section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , but not applicable to any case commenced under this title before that date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under .Nov. 3, 1988section 12 of Pub. L. 100–597section 101 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Notwithstanding and subject to subsection (b) of this section, special revenues acquired by the debtor after the commencement of the case shall remain subject to any lien resulting from any security agreement entered into by the debtor before the commencement of the case.section 552(a) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Any such lien on special revenues, other than municipal betterment assessments, derived from a project or system shall be subject to the necessary operating expenses of such project or system, as the case may be.
